Describe what changed and why.

## Documentation scope

- Pages or routes changed:
- Owning product team:
- Technical reviewer:

## Preview

@netlify /

Replace `/` with the primary route reviewers should open in the Netlify Deploy Preview.

## Review checklist

- [ ] This pull request contains one focused documentation change.
- [ ] Product terminology and behavior were confirmed by the owning product team.
- [ ] Endpoint paths, field names, enum values, currencies, and status codes were confirmed by engineering.
- [ ] Every changed request includes verified success and error examples, or an explicit approved source gap.
- [ ] No API keys, credentials, personal data, merchant details, or internal volumes were added.
- [ ] Stable content IDs were preserved; existing IDs were not renamed or renumbered.
- [ ] Navigation, links, images, code samples, and responsive layout were checked in the Deploy Preview.
- [ ] `npm run verify` and `npm run build` pass.
- [ ] Documentation owner approval is requested.
